meta.method: team unit strength = SNAP-WEIGHTED MEAN of PAA-per-play over the projected 2026 roster (movers carry rate+snaps to 2026 team; rookies via draft-round prior calibrated to 2025 class + DB college blend). Replaces the raw Points-Saved SUM. 32-team Hazen percentiles.
limitations: SIS = top-200 leaderboard, 2025 only; rookie n=9-14/unit -> round curves are shrunk priors
2024 NFL Value (2nd rookie class) needs a SIS pull
